---
title: "New speaker of the OSC's Scientific Board!"
date: 2024-06-26
subtitle: "Prof. Dr. Nikolaus Plesnila is the new speaker of the Scientific Board of the OSC"
categories: ["Announcement"]

template: templates/news-template.html
filters:
  - templates/process-news-yaml.lua
---


<p>The OSC's Scientific Board now has a new speaker: <a href="/people/people/nikolaus-plesnila.qmd" title="Plesnila">Prof. Dr. Nikolaus Plesnila</a>. Additionally <a href="/people/people/tobias-straub.qmd" title="Straub">Dr. Tobias Straub</a> has joined the Scientifc Board as <a href="/people/people/ralf-ludwig.qmd" title="Ludwig">Prof. Dr. Ralf Ludwig</a> has stepped down from the board.</p>
<p>More information about the members of the OSC's Scientific Board can be found <a href="/people/scientific-board.qmd" title="Scientific Board">here</a>.</p>
<div class="g-clear"></div>
